tools.name: discover_project
tools.purpose: Locate Cortex state and return file roles, metadata status, and recovery order.

tools.name: validate_project
tools.purpose: Check required files, placeholders, stale paths, safety gates, and recovery-order consistency.

tools.name: read_project_brief
tools.purpose: Return current state, open tasks, blocked tasks, open questions, next step, safety gates, and recent learnings.

tools.name: append_worklog
tools.purpose: Append public decisions, assumptions, evidence, open questions, and next steps.

tools.name: append_learning
tools.purpose: Append failed approaches, caveats, compatibility notes, or do-not-repeat lessons.

tools.name: update_task
tools.purpose: Add, move, block, or complete a task.

tools.name: prepare_closeout
tools.purpose: Generate proposed updates for state, sessions, tasks, worklog, learnings, and final response.

tools.name: check_cortex_updates
tools.purpose: Check public GitHub manifest, commit, and changelog metadata for newer Cortex framework, skill, template, prompt, or tool versions without downloading updates.

tools.name: prepare_cortex_update
tools.purpose: Download or install a Cortex update only after documented changes are summarized and explicit user approval is given.

defaultPolicy.crossProjectReferences: allowed as optional references only; non-trivial reuse requires user approval
defaultPolicy.networkUpdateCheck: allowed only for public metadata and changelog checks
defaultPolicy.downloadInstallUpdates: requires explicit approval after documented changes are shown
